seoTitle: Dwarda vs Eagle Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dwarda and Eagle Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dwarda vs Eagle Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dwarda and Eagle Bay.
heading: Dwarda vs Eagle Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dwarda, Western Australia and Eagle Bay, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Eagle Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Dwarda (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dwarda or Eagle Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dwarda has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Eagle Bay scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dwarda scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Eagle Bay scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dwarda or Eagle Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Eagle Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
